hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [[ "$f" == */apps/portal/* ]] && [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && pnpm --filter portal exec eslint "$f" --max-warnings 0; }
